body_transformation: The serpentine body now features interlocking steel plates with subtle engraved geometric patterns along its length, replacing the smooth scales with a matte gunmetal gray finish. Delicate spine fins transform into rigid, angular metallic blades with sharp edges and chrome silver accents, maintaining their original placement and structure. The pointed head retains its slender shape but gains a polished steel snout with indigo energy lines tracing its contours. Large expressive eyes become smooth, reflective chrome orbs with deep indigo highlights beneath the single eyelid, preserving their original size and position.
signature_feature: Spine fins: interlocking steel blades with engraved geometric patterns and indigo energy lines.
